title.rendered: We’re Nominated – Help Travel FX Reach the Podium at the British Travel Awards!

content.rendered:
We’ve got exciting news! Travel FX has once again been nominated for Best Foreign Exchange Retailer at the 2025 British Travel Awards — and with your support, we could take home a top spot.

We’re incredibly proud to be one of the only online-only companies in the running, up against some of the biggest high street names in the business. It’s a real David vs Goliath moment — and every single vote makes a huge difference.

Voting is now open – and it takes just 1 minute to vote!

All you need to do is:

  1. Click here or on the button above

  2. Fill in a quick form (it takes about 60 seconds)

  3. That’s it!

PLUS – every vote enters you into the British Travel Awards’ prize draw to win an amazing holiday (prize details coming soon – but trust us, it’s worth it!).

👉Vote Now!

Vote & Win Big – Amazing Holiday Prizes Up for Grabs!

When you cast your vote in the British Travel Awards, you won’t just be supporting Travel FX — you’ll also be entered into a huge prize draw with some seriously exciting rewards.

This year’s prize chest is packed with incredible travel goodies, including:

✈️ Return flights to dream destinations
🏨 Luxury hotel stays
🌴 Complete holiday packages
🧳 Short breaks, travel essentials, and more!

Whether you’re dreaming of white-sand beaches, a chic city escape, or a countryside retreat — this is your chance to win something unforgettable.

Look out for updates — we’ll be revealing exactly what’s inside this year’s prize bundle very soon.

So don’t miss your chance! Vote now, support Travel FX, and you could be packing your bags before you know it.

👉Vote Now!

 Why the British Travel Awards Matter

The British Travel Awards are one of the most respected and recognised consumer-voted travel awards in the UK — and what makes them special is that the winners are chosen by you, the travelling public.

Unlike some awards decided behind closed doors, the BTAs are a true reflection of what travellers value most — great service, trusted brands, and companies that go the extra mile.

Being nominated (and winning!) isn’t just a shiny badge for us — it’s a huge honour and a vote of confidence from the people who matter most: our customers.

With your help, we’ve previously landed podium positions, even taking home Silver in 2021. Every vote helps show that there’s still a place for independent, online-first providers in a world dominated by high-street giants.

So whether you’ve exchanged money with us once or a hundred times, your vote truly counts — and we’d love your support this year.

Why vote for Travel FX?

Over the years, thousands of you have trusted us to deliver competitive rates, fast delivery, and reliable service. We don’t have branches on every corner — but we do have loyal customers who know great value when they see it.

Just look at what one of our recent customers had to say:

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
“The rates are always competitive (much better than you can get in a shop or travel agent) and I choose when they get delivered which is always quick. What more could I ask for?” – Trustpilot Review

We’re proud of what we’ve built — and it’s thanks to you.

So if you’ve used Travel FX and loved our service, please take a moment to vote. It really does mean the world to us.

📣 Spread the word!

Once you’ve voted, don’t forget to tell your friends, family, and fellow travellers. You can even share this post on your social media to help us reach more people:

Thank you for your continued support — let’s see how high we can climb in 2025!

#VoteForTravelFX #BTA2025 #BritishTravelAwards #BestFXRetailer #TravelFX

itemListElement.name: We’re Nominated – Help Travel FX Reach the Podium at the British Travel Awards!

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
